criteria.name: controls_are_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: Catalog entries, table rows, filesystem toggle, timeline entries, scrubber, tree rows, disclosures, forms, annotation links, step-type filter, undo/redo, export tabs, copy/download/import, and the command palette are keyboard accessible with Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, or Space
criteria.reasoning: Buttons, radios, slider, timeline entries, and form controls are exposed as keyboard-operable elements. Evidence: timeline-keyboard-shared.png

criteria.name: modals_manage_focus
criteria.description: Opening the note form or command palette moves focus to its first field; closing returns focus to the originating control; Escape dismisses the overlay
criteria.reasoning: The annotation dialog focused its first textarea, Escape dismissed it, and focus returned to Annotate. Evidence: validation-shared.png

criteria.name: images_and_icons_have_alt_text
criteria.description: Images rendered in the file workspace and meaningful icons carry descriptive alternative text or accessible names
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Multiple rendered img elements had no accessible names or alt text in the browser snapshot. Evidence: trial-viewer-shared.png

criteria.name: feedback_uses_live_regions
criteria.description: Validation errors and copy-export confirmation are conveyed visually and via ARIA live regions or equivalent accessible announcements
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Validation used role=alert, but clicking Copy export produced no visible or live-region confirmation. Evidence: export-copy-shared.png

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: Note and classification form fields use explicit labels associated with their inputs
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Note fields had explicit labels, but classification selects were visually labeled only by generic text without associated label elements. Evidence: trial-viewer-shared.png

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Headings in the catalog, task page, and trial viewer follow a logical order with no skips
criteria.reasoning: Catalog, task page, and viewer headings followed sequential H1/H2/H3 structure without skips. Evidence: task-page-shared.png

criteria.name: landmark_navigation_is_present
criteria.description: Skip-to-content or landmark regions (main, navigation) are present for the catalog and viewer chrome
criteria.reasoning: The catalog and viewer expose main content plus complementary landmark regions for navigation/workspace areas. Evidence: trial-viewer-shared.png

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: Timeline text, badges, form labels, and export preview text have sufficient color contrast against their backgrounds
criteria.reasoning: Rendered timeline text, badges, labels, and primary controls were visibly distinguishable against their dark backgrounds. Evidence: trial-viewer-shared.png

criteria.name: semantic_html_roles_are_used
criteria.description: Semantic roles such as nav, main, and button are used for catalog navigation, viewer chrome, and primary actions
criteria.reasoning: Primary UI uses semantic main, header, buttons, complementary regions, radiogroups, table, dialog, tabs, and form controls. Evidence: trial-viewer-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_is_respected
criteria.description: Animations respect prefers-reduced-motion while timeline, forms, palette, and export remain fully usable
criteria.reasoning: In the reduced-motion browser, prefers-reduced-motion matched true, transitions/animations were reduced to 0.00001s, and the viewer timeline and export dialog remained usable. Evidence: reduced-viewer-shared.png

criteria.name: timeline_keyboard_current
criteria.description: With the timeline focused, arrow keys move the active step among visible steps, Home and End jump to the first and last visible steps, and the active entry is programmatically marked as current
criteria.reasoning: ArrowRight moved the timeline from step 1 to 2; End selected step 14; Home returned to step 1, with aria-current="step" observed on the active entry. Evidence: timeline-keyboard-shared.png

criteria.name: multi_facet_reset_round_trip
criteria.description: Multi-facet reload round-trip: open a trial, add an annotation, submit a classification, set the step-type filter to tool-call, and switch the export tab to Review markdown, then reload. All facets coherently reset to the seeded baseline — no annotations, no report card, filter back to All, empty undo history, and default export preview with empty annotations and null failure_report — never a mix where some facets survive
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: After reload, the annotation, classification, tool-call filter, and Review markdown tab all persisted instead of resetting. Evidence: multi_facet_reset_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: reward_sort_reversal_live
criteria.description: Sort-reversal proof: on a task page, click the reward column header to sort ascending, note the first and last model names, then click again for descending; the order reverses correctly relative to reward values, proving sort derives from live data rather than two hardcoded orders
criteria.reasoning: Ascending and descending clicks reversed the live rows by reward: 0.41→0.92 and then 0.92→0.41. Evidence: reward_sort_reversal_live-shared.png

criteria.name: export_and_badges_track_inputs
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: add a note on step 3, then submit a classification with evidence mentioning a unique phrase; the annotations list, report card, and Review JSON export preview each change to include that note_text and evidence while unrelated trials remain untouched
criteria.reasoning: The live annotations list, failure report, and Review JSON visibly contained the entered note and unique evidence phrase. Evidence: export_and_badges_track_inputs-shared.png

criteria.name: cross_view_echo_without_reload
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: submit a classification on a trial, then confirm the report card and the Export panel failure_report object show the same stage, root_cause, behavior, impact, evidence, and implicated_steps without a reload; clicking an implicated-step link also moves the timeline highlight to that step
criteria.reasoning: Without reload, the report and export showed matching classification fields, evidence, and implicated step 3; clicking Step 3 left the timeline scrubber at 3. Evidence: cross_view_echo_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: annotation_count_delta_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: note the annotations list count, add exactly one valid note, and immediately confirm the list length increased by exactly one and the Review JSON annotations array length matches; remove that note and confirm both counts decrease by exactly one
criteria.reasoning: Observed annotation count 0→1 after adding one note, Review JSON annotations length 1, then count 1→0 after removal and JSON annotations became []. Evidence: annotation_count_delta_exact-shared.png

criteria.name: different_reviews_different_exports
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: on two different trials (or two successive review sessions with Undo between), enter different note_text and different classification enum values, export each Review JSON, and confirm the two previews differ exactly where the entered values differ
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Only one distinct review input/export pair was completed; a second differing review session was not fully exercised.

criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: The required interleaved trial-A/trial-B workflow was not completed.

criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: with no annotations, confirm the empty annotations state and an empty annotations array in the export preview; add two notes and a classification, confirm both surfaces fill; Undo until annotations are empty again and failure_report is null, and confirm the empty state and export preview track both transitions
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Empty state and repopulation were observed separately, but the full two-note/classification/undo round-trip was not completed.

criteria.name: full_pipeline_to_export_import
criteria.description: Full-pipeline probe: open a task, sort by reward descending, open the top trial, annotate a late step, submit a valid classification, open Export and confirm Review JSON shows schemaVersion exactly trajectory-viewer.review-package.v1 and carries those values, Copy export with confirmation, then import that JSON after clearing the session edits and confirm the annotations list and report card match the imported package
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Export, copy confirmation, and import were exercised, but the exact full pipeline with sorted top trial, late-step annotation, and cleared-session import was not completed end-to-end.

criteria.name: seeded_catalog_and_task_page
criteria.description: On load, the task catalog lists exactly 3 seeded benchmark tasks, each showing a task name, a one-line description, a trial count of 3, and a best-reward value; selecting a task opens its page with the instruction text rendered as formatted rich text, a config summary panel, a reference environment file tree, and a test listing with at least 3 named tests
criteria.reasoning: Observed exactly 3 seeded task cards, then a task page with formatted instruction text, configuration panel, filesystem tree, and 4 evaluator tests. Evidence: seeded_catalog_and_task_page-shared.png

criteria.name: trial_table_columns_complete
criteria.description: The task page lists all 3 of that task's trials in a comparison table whose columns include model (fictional model names, no real vendor or product names), reward shown as a number between 0 and 1 with two decimals, a pass or fail outcome, duration, and step count
criteria.reasoning: Observed all 3 trials with fictional model names, two-decimal rewards, outcomes, durations, and step counts. Evidence: trial_table_columns_complete-shared.png

criteria.name: reward_sort_reversal
criteria.description: Scripted probe: click the reward column header and note the row order, then click it again; the second order is the reverse of the first relative to the reward values, proving the sort derives from live data rather than fixed markup
criteria.reasoning: Clicked Reward twice; observed order change from 0.41/0.68/0.92 to 0.92/0.68/0.41. Evidence: reward_sort_reversal-shared.png

criteria.name: filesystem_toggle_swaps_tree
criteria.description: Activating the two-position toggle above the file tree swaps the visible tree between the reference filesystem and the selected trial's final agent filesystem without a full page reload, the two trees differ in content, and the active side is visibly indicated at all times
criteria.reasoning: Clicked Reference and Trial final; observed different file contents and visible radio selection without reload. Evidence: filesystem_toggle_swaps_tree-shared.png

criteria.name: ingest_checklist_then_viewer_header
criteria.description: Clicking a trial row first shows a simulated ingest checklist of at least 4 items that tick complete one by one with per-item status icons and an overall progress indicator, then opens the trial viewer whose header strip shows that trial's model name, reward, pass or fail badge, and duration matching its table row
criteria.reasoning: Observed a 4-item ingest checklist with Complete/Running/Queued states, then the viewer header matching model, reward, fail outcome, and duration. Evidence: ingest_checklist_then_viewer_header-shared.png

criteria.name: timeline_mixed_step_types
criteria.description: The trial timeline lists at least 12 ordered steps, includes at least one reasoning, one tool call, one observation, one terminal output, and one screenshot step, and each entry shows a step index, a type glyph, a one-line summary, a timestamp, and a status marker; in the trial seeded with a failed step, that step shows an error status in the timeline and an error-styled output in its tool invocation panel while the viewer remains fully functional
criteria.reasoning: Observed 14 ordered timeline entries with indices, types, timestamps, summaries, statuses, including reasoning, tool call, observation, terminal, screenshot, and an error step with failed terminal output. Evidence: ingest_checklist_then_viewer_header-shared.png

criteria.name: click_step_syncs_all_panes
criteria.description: Clicking any timeline entry highlights that entry as active and updates both the center file workspace and the right rail step detail to that step's content in the same interaction, without a page reload
criteria.reasoning: Clicked step 9 and observed active timeline highlight, workspace state after step 9, and matching right-rail details. Evidence: click_step_syncs_all_panes-shared.png

criteria.name: keyboard_and_scrubber_navigation
criteria.description: With the timeline focused, pressing the arrow keys moves the active step to the previous or next visible step with the newly active entry scrolled into view and the other panes following; dragging the scrubber updates the active step continuously while the handle moves, not only on release
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Arrow-key navigation moved the active step and slider value, but continuous scrubber dragging was not fully observed. Evidence: keyboard_and_scrubber_navigation-shared.png

criteria.name: badge_accumulation_probe
criteria.description: Scripted probe: activate an early step and record which files carry Added/Modified/Deleted/Truncated badges, advance several steps and confirm badges accumulate for newly changed files, then step backward and confirm the badge set recomputes so it reflects only changes at or before the now-active step
criteria.reasoning: Observed no badges at step 1, Added/Modified/Truncated badges at step 10, and recomputed badges after returning to step 1. Evidence: badge_accumulation_probe-shared.png

criteria.name: file_renderers_by_type
criteria.description: Selecting files in the tree renders each by type: a markdown file as formatted rich text (headings/lists, not raw markup), a code file in a monospaced block with syntax-aware coloring, a visible language label, and a copy control that shows visible confirmation and places the exact text on the clipboard, an image file scaled to fit its pane, and a tabular data file as a grid with column headers; a file badged Deleted shows a deleted-file notice instead of stale content
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Markdown, code, image, table, deleted-file notice, language label, and copy confirmation were observed, but exact clipboard contents could not be directly verified. Evidence: file_renderers_by_type-shared.png

criteria.name: terminal_streaming_and_follow
criteria.description: Activating a step with terminal output renders the output progressively (text appears incrementally) with a status affordance distinguishing streaming from complete; while streaming, the panel auto-follows the latest line, scrolling up pauses following and reveals a jump-to-latest control, and activating that control resumes following
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Terminal output and complete/streaming states were observed, but scrolling pause, jump-to-latest, and resumed following were not fully exercised. Evidence: terminal_streaming_and_follow-shared.png

criteria.name: annotation_round_trip_probe
criteria.description: Scripted probe: activate a late step, submit a note through the annotate control, confirm the note appears immediately in the annotations list with that step's index, navigate to an early step, click the note, and confirm the timeline highlight, center workspace, and right rail all jump to the annotated step; the note's remove control then deletes exactly that note
criteria.reasoning: Added a step-14 note, navigated away, clicked the note from the annotations list, observed jump back to step 14, then removed exactly that note. Evidence: annotation_round_trip_probe-shared.png

criteria.name: forms_inline_validation
criteria.description: Submitting the note form with empty note_text or text longer than 500 characters shows an inline message naming note_text and attaches nothing; submitting the classification form with any select unset, evidence outside 20–2000 characters, or no implicated steps shows inline per-field messages naming each invalid field and creates no report card
criteria.reasoning: Empty note submission showed note_text validation; empty classification submission showed per-field messages for all required fields. Evidence: forms_inline_validation-shared.png

criteria.name: classification_report_links_jump
criteria.description: Submitting a valid failure classification using the declared enums (stage in planning/tool-use/verification/recovery; root_cause in wrong-tool/missing-context/hallucinated-path/timeout; behavior in loops/abandons/invents-files/ignores-errors; impact in score-zero/partial-credit/flaky-pass/false-pass) renders a report card showing all four chosen classifications, the evidence text, and one link per implicated step; clicking an implicated-step link jumps the viewer to that step, and re-submitting the form updates the existing card in place
criteria.reasoning: Valid classification produced a report with all four labels, evidence, and Step 9 link; link navigation worked and resubmission updated the existing report card in place. Evidence: classification_report_links_jump-shared.png

criteria.name: reasoning_disclosure_remembers_state
criteria.description: The reasoning region on a step is collapsed by default, expands and collapses on activation, and after expanding it on one step, navigating away and back shows that step's reasoning still expanded while other steps remain collapsed
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The reasoning paragraph was visibly expanded on initial step activation rather than collapsed by default, so the required disclosure behavior was not satisfied. Evidence: click_step_syncs_all_panes-shared.png

criteria.name: step_type_filter_narrows_timeline
criteria.description: The step-type filter above the timeline offers All plus reasoning, tool-call, observation, terminal, and screenshot; activating tool-call narrows the visible timeline to tool-call steps only, and choosing All restores the full ordered list
criteria.reasoning: Applied tool-call filter and observed 4 tool-call entries only; cleared filter and restored the full 14-step timeline. Evidence: step_type_filter_narrows_timeline-shared.png

criteria.name: command_palette_jumps_to_step
criteria.description: Pressing Ctrl+K or Cmd+K opens a command palette with search focused; typing part of a step summary on the open trial narrows results, and activating a step result makes that step active with timeline, workspace, and detail in sync; Escape closes the palette
criteria.reasoning: Opened the palette, searched “targeted,” observed one result, activated it, and confirmed step 9 became active; Escape closed the palette. Evidence: command_palette_jumps_to_step-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_redo_review_edits
criteria.description: After adding an annotation and submitting a classification, Undo restores the prior report and annotation state across the annotations list, report card, and export preview; Redo reapplies them; Undo and Redo disable when their stacks are empty
criteria.reasoning: Undo removed the latest annotation state and enabled Redo; Redo restored it, with report and annotation controls reflected in the viewer. Evidence: undo_redo_review_edits-shared.png

criteria.name: review_package_export_reflects_session
criteria.description: After annotating at least one step and submitting a valid classification, the Export panel Review JSON preview shows schemaVersion exactly trajectory-viewer.review-package.v1 and contains the exact note_text, step_index, stage, root_cause, behavior, impact, evidence, and implicated_steps just entered under the required keys schemaVersion, exportedAt, trial_id, task_id, model, reward, outcome, duration, step_count, annotations, and failure_report; Copy export puts that exact preview text on the clipboard with visible confirmation, and Download export yields a file matching the preview
criteria.reasoning: Export preview showed the required schemaVersion and session fields, exact annotation/classification data, visible copy confirmation, and a downloaded JSON file. Evidence: review_package_export_reflects_session-shared.png

criteria.name: review_package_import_round_trip
criteria.description: Exporting Review JSON for a trial with annotations and a report, clearing those session edits, then importing that JSON via Import review package reconstructs the annotations list and report card to match the imported payload
criteria.reasoning: Cleared the review, imported the exported JSON through the visible import form, and observed the annotation and failure report reconstructed. Evidence: review_package_import_round_trip-shared.png

criteria.name: annotation_edit_updates_in_place
criteria.description: Editing an existing annotation's note_text through its edit control updates that entry in place in the annotations list and in the export preview, leaving other notes unchanged
criteria.reasoning: Edited the existing note; the annotation list changed to “Edited defect note.” and the export preview reflected the new text without altering other state. Evidence: annotation_edit_updates_in_place-shared.png

criteria.name: spacing_and_sizing_follow_scale
criteria.description: Spacing and sizing in the three-pane viewer, catalog, and export panel follow a consistent scale with no arbitrary one-off gaps visible in computed styles
criteria.reasoning: Consistent panel widths, padding, gaps, and hairline dividers are visible across catalog and viewer. Evidence: viewer-shared.png

criteria.name: typography_matches_spec
criteria.description: Typography matches the instruction: monospaced for code, terminal, paths, step indices, and export preview; UI sans elsewhere; clear title > heading > body hierarchy
criteria.reasoning: UI text uses sans-serif while paths, step indices, timestamps, and export content use monospace. Evidence: viewer-shared.png

criteria.name: layout_matches_spec_composition
criteria.description: At 1440px the trial viewer matches the specified three-pane composition (timeline ~1/5, center widest, detail ~1/4) with hairline separators
criteria.reasoning: At 1440px, measured panes are approximately 299px / 741px / 385px, matching the requested proportions with visible separators. Evidence: viewer-shared.png

criteria.name: specified_state_changes_animate
criteria.description: Transitions are applied to the state changes the spec calls out: step change cross-fade, disclosure height, annotation list enter/exit, report card enter, palette open, and filter row changes
criteria.reasoning: Rendered elements expose observed 0.15s/0.2s transitions and pane-fade/item-enter animations for viewer state changes. Evidence: viewer-shared.png

criteria.name: responsive_behavior_matches_spec
criteria.description: Responsive behavior matches the spec: tabbed collapse at 1024px and below, no page-level horizontal scroll at 375px
criteria.reasoning: At 1024px the layout collapses into Timeline/Workspace/Detail tabs; at 375px document and body scroll widths remain 375px with no page-level horizontal scroll. Evidence: responsive-1024.png, responsive-375.png

criteria.name: control_styling_matches_spec
criteria.description: Buttons, selects, filter chips, and export tabs show distinct default, hover, focus, disabled, and error treatments consistent with the dense instrument register

criteria.name: shared_state_coherence
criteria.description: All panes derive from one shared state: changing the active step from any control (timeline click, arrow keys, scrubber, annotation link, report link, command palette) updates the timeline highlight, file tree badges, and right rail together in one interaction, and an added, edited, or removed annotation plus a classification submit update the annotations list, report card, and export preview immediately without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Active-step search updated the timeline, slider, workspace, and details; annotation, classification, and JSON export updated immediately. Evidence: shared_state_coherence-after-review.png

criteria.name: no_storage_reload_seeded
criteria.description: No browser storage is used: localStorage and sessionStorage remain empty after opening trials, scrubbing, annotating, classifying, exporting, and undoing, and a page reload returns the app to its seeded state — the 3-task catalog with no annotations, no classification reports, empty undo history, and a default export preview with empty annotations and a null failure_report
criteria.reasoning: After reload the seeded 3-task catalog returned, with empty storage; reopening a trial showed zero annotations and no report. Evidence: no_storage_reload_seeded-shared.png

criteria.name: console_clean_full_exercise
criteria.description: The console is free of errors and warnings on load and stays clean after opening tasks and trials, scrubbing the timeline, streaming terminal output, filtering steps, using the command palette, annotating, classifying, undoing, and exporting
criteria.reasoning: Console inspection after the exercised workflows reported 0 errors and 0 warnings. Evidence: shared_state_coherence-after-review.png

criteria.name: load_and_interaction_stability
criteria.description: The app is interactive (catalog entries respond to activation) within 2 seconds of a local cold load, rapidly scrubbing back and forth across all steps of a trial stays smooth with no hangs, no dropped interactions, and no pane showing a step other than the active one, and the timeline, tree, forms, undo, and export preview remain responsive while terminal output is streaming
criteria.reasoning: Catalog activation completed promptly; Home/End and rapid ArrowRight/ArrowLeft scrubbing across all 14 steps kept the active timeline, workspace, and details synchronized. Evidence: shared_state_coherence-trial.png

criteria.name: keyboard_operability_focus
criteria.description: Every interactive control — catalog entries, table rows, the filesystem toggle, timeline entries, the scrubber, tree rows, disclosure toggles, form fields, annotation links, step-type filter, undo and redo, export format tabs, copy and download, import, and the command palette — is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone with a visible focus indicator, Home and End jump the timeline to the first and last visible steps, the active timeline entry is programmatically marked as current, opening the note form or command palette moves focus to its first field with focus returning to the opening control on close, and overlays close on the Escape key
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Command palette and annotation dialogs focus their first fields, and Home/End work, but Escape closes the command palette with focus returning to BODY rather than the opening control. Evidence: shared_state_coherence-after-review.png

criteria.name: labels_errors_alt_text
criteria.description: Form fields have visible labels, each validation message names the field it belongs to (including note_text, stage, root_cause, behavior, impact, evidence, and implicated_steps) and renders in association with that field, and images rendered in the file workspace carry descriptive alternative text
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Visible form labels and field-specific validation were observed, but file-workspace image/icon elements lacked descriptive alternative text. Evidence: labels_errors_alt_text-shared.png

criteria.name: api_shaped_form_and_export_contracts
criteria.description: The note and classification forms enforce the declared API-shaped bounds and enums (note_text non-empty ≤500 chars; stage/root_cause/behavior/impact restricted to their declared option sets; evidence 20–2000 chars; implicated_steps non-empty), and the Review JSON export uses the same field names and nesting with schemaVersion exactly trajectory-viewer.review-package.v1 plus exportedAt, trial_id, task_id, model, reward, outcome, duration, step_count, annotations[].note_text/step_index, and failure_report.stage/root_cause/behavior/impact/evidence/implicated_steps (or null)
criteria.reasoning: Visible forms exposed the declared labels/bounds and enum choices; validation rejected empty note_text, and Review JSON visibly matched the required schemaVersion, fields, nesting, and failure_report structure. Evidence: shared_state_coherence-after-review.png

criteria.name: open_trial_end_to_end
criteria.description: Comparing and opening a trial end to end: open a task from the catalog, sort its trial table by reward descending, click the top row, watch the ingest checklist complete, and land in the viewer with step 1 active and the header showing that trial's model, reward, outcome, and duration
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: reward-desc sorting did not visibly reorder the trials; the top opened trial remained reward 0.41 rather than the highest reward. Evidence: open_trial_end_to_end-shared.png

criteria.name: scrub_inspect_files_flow
criteria.description: Scrubbing and inspecting files: drag the scrubber to a mid-trial step, confirm the file tree badges reflect only changes up to that step, select a badged code file and see it rendered with coloring and a working copy control, then advance one step and see any new change badge appear
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: scrubbing to step 7, badges, syntax-colored code, and Copy code worked, but the required advance to step 8 and verification of a newly appearing badge was not completed. Evidence: timeline_filter_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: annotate_and_return_flow
criteria.description: Annotating and returning: activate a late step, attach a note to it, navigate back to an early step, then click the note in the annotations list and land back on the annotated step with all three panes in sync
criteria.reasoning: Late-step note was created, the viewer was moved to step 1, and clicking the annotation returned to step 14 with timeline, workspace, and details synchronized. Evidence: annotate_and_return_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: classify_failure_flow
criteria.description: Classifying a failure: submit the classification form with fields missing and see per-field messages, correct every field using the declared enum values, submit, and see the report card with implicated-step links that jump the viewer when clicked
criteria.reasoning: Missing submission showed per-field validation; valid enum values and evidence produced a Failure report with an implicated Step 14 link. Evidence: classify_failure_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: timeline_filter_flow
criteria.description: Filtering the timeline: choose the tool-call step-type filter, confirm only tool-call steps remain, activate one, then clear the filter and confirm the full ordered timeline returns with the same step still active when it is still in range
criteria.reasoning: The tool-call filter showed only 4 tool-call steps; step 7 was activated, then clearing returned the ordered 14-step timeline with step 7 still active. Evidence: timeline_filter_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: command_palette_jump_flow
criteria.description: Command palette jump: press Ctrl+K or Cmd+K, type part of a step summary, activate the match, and land on that step with timeline, workspace, and detail in sync
criteria.reasoning: Ctrl+K opened the palette, searching “smallest implementation” returned step 7, and selecting it synchronized timeline, workspace, and detail panes. Evidence: command_palette_jump_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: export_closes_the_loop
criteria.description: Export closes the loop: after annotating at least one step and submitting a valid classification, open the Export panel, confirm Review JSON shows schemaVersion exactly trajectory-viewer.review-package.v1 and carries the exact values just entered, copy it with visible confirmation, then Undo the classification and confirm the preview's failure_report becomes null while annotations remain until undone
criteria.reasoning: Review JSON showed schemaVersion trajectory-viewer.review-package.v1 and the entered annotation/report values; Copy export displayed confirmation. Undo removed failure_report while the annotation remained. Evidence: export_closes_the_loop-shared.png

criteria.name: import_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: Import round trip: export Review JSON for a trial with annotations and a report, clear the annotations and report, import that JSON, and confirm the annotations list and report card match the imported values
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: after clearing the review, the import workflow did not expose a usable import dialog or restore the exported annotation/report; the visible export preview remained empty. Evidence: export_closes_the_loop-shared.png

criteria.name: reload_returns_seeded_state
criteria.description: A page reload returns the app to its seeded state: the task catalog with 3 tasks, no annotations, no classification reports, empty undo history, and a default export preview with empty annotations and a null failure_report
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: reload visibly returned the catalog with exactly 3 tasks, but the default export preview and all seeded review-state fields were not fully observed after that reload. Evidence: reload_returns_seeded_state-shared.png

criteria.name: invalid_create_shows_inline_validation
criteria.description: Invalid note or classification submission triggers immediate inline validation naming the offending fields and changes no review state
criteria.reasoning: Submitting the empty classification form immediately displayed named inline errors for stage, root_cause, behavior, impact, evidence, and implicated_steps without changing review state. Evidence: classify_failure_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: three_pane_workspace_composition
criteria.description: At a 1440px viewport the trial viewer composes as a fixed three-pane workspace separated by hairline borders — a left timeline rail roughly one fifth of the width, a center file workspace as the widest pane, and a right detail rail roughly one quarter — reading as one instrument rather than a stack of disconnected cards
criteria.reasoning: PASS — At 1440px, the live viewer shows fixed timeline, center workspace, and detail panes with hairline separations. Evidence: trial-viewer-loaded-shared.png

criteria.name: type_roles_and_hierarchy
criteria.description: A monospaced face is used for code, terminal output, file paths, step indices, and the export preview while a UI sans is used elsewhere, and page titles are visibly larger than section headings, which are larger than body and label text, consistently across views
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Terminal output and paths use monospace, but the visible trial-viewer page title hierarchy is inconsistent: the h1 is visually hidden and section headings are not consistently subordinate to a visible page title. Evidence: trial-viewer-loaded-shared.png

criteria.name: status_color_system_consistent
criteria.description: One status color system is applied consistently wherever a status appears (timeline markers, tool panels, outcome badges): a single accent marks the active step, green marks complete/pass, red marks error/fail, amber marks running/streaming, and every status also carries a text label or glyph so color is never the only indicator
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Complete/pass/fail/streaming states are visibly distinct and carry text labels or glyphs, with green completion, red failure, amber streaming, and an accent active step. Evidence: trial-viewer-loaded-shared.png

criteria.name: change_badge_treatments_distinct
criteria.description: The Added, Modified, Deleted, and Truncated change badges each render a visually distinct treatment and always include their word, never a color chip alone
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Added, Modified, Deleted, and Truncated badges are all visibly present as distinct labeled treatments. Evidence: change_badge_treatments_distinct-shared.png

criteria.name: dense_register_icons_states
criteria.description: The trial table, timeline, and file tree use compact dense rows with cards and panels carrying subtle shadows and hairline borders rather than heavy outlines, one consistent icon set is used across the chrome, and the ingest checklist, empty terminal, empty annotations, and empty filtered timeline states are each deliberately designed surfaces with explanatory copy rather than blank regions
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: Dense rows, file tree, empty terminal, empty annotations, and empty filtered timeline were observed, but no ingest checklist surface was reachable for verification. Evidence: dense_register_icons_states-filtered-shared.png

criteria.name: tabbed_collapse_small_viewport
criteria.description: At a viewport of 1024px wide or below, the three panes collapse into a tabbed arrangement where timeline, workspace, and detail are switchable one at a time, and the active step stays consistent across tab switches
criteria.reasoning: PASS — At 1024px the panes collapse into Timeline, Workspace, and Detail tabs; switching tabs preserves the active step 1. Evidence: tabbed_collapse_small_viewport-shared.png

criteria.name: copy_conventions_specific_labels
criteria.description: Headings, buttons, and labels follow one consistent capitalization convention throughout, and action labels are specific verbs (Add note, Classify failure, Copy export, Import review package) rather than generic labels where a specific one is possible
criteria.reasoning: PASS — Labels consistently use title-style capitalization and specific actions such as Import review package, Add/Annotate, Classify failure, Copy export, and Clear filter. Evidence: trial-viewer-loaded-shared.png

criteria.name: export_and_palette_first_class
criteria.description: The Export panel shows a monospaced preview with clear format tabs, and the command palette is a centered overlay with a distinct search field and ranked results, reading as first-class surfaces rather than afterthought dialogs

criteria.description: Where the app renders headings and section titles (catalog, task page, trial viewer, Export panel), they use consistent capitalization throughout
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Headings mix title case (“Task Instruction”, “Configuration”) with sentence case (“Environment files”, “Evaluator tests”, “Trial comparison”). Evidence: headings_use_consistent_capitalization-task.png

criteria.name: actions_use_specific_labels
criteria.description: Where the app renders button or action labels, they are specific verbs such as Add note, Classify failure, Copy export, and Import review package, not generic Submit or OK when a specific label is possible
criteria.reasoning: Buttons use concrete labels such as “Import review package”, “Copy export”, “Download export”, and “Classify failure”. Evidence: actions_use_specific_labels-shared.png

criteria.name: errors_name_problem_and_fix

criteria.name: empty_states_explain_next_step

criteria.reasoning: The empty annotation state says notes attach evidence and instructs the user to use Annotate; the terminal empty state explains selecting a terminal step. Evidence: empty_states_explain_next_step-shared.png

criteria.description: Where the app renders body or helper copy in the catalog, ingest checklist, and export panel, rate how free it is of spelling and grammatical errors

criteria.reasoning: The UI consistently uses annotations, failure classification, Review JSON, and Review markdown across the viewer and export/import surfaces. Evidence: actions_use_specific_labels-shared.png
